entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A pest insect whose larval growth and gut zymogen activation are inhibited by plant protease inhibitors

entities.name: PLANT PROTEASE INHIBITORS
entities.description: Proteins from plants that inhibit protease enzymes, used to reduce larval growth of pests

entities.name: ISOPROTEINASES
entities.description: Protease enzymes in the gut of H. armigera that are inhibited by plant PIs

entities.name: LARVAL GROWTH
entities.description: The growth and development of H. armigera larvae, which is stunted by plant PIs

entities.name: DATURA ALBA
entities.description: A non-host plant whose protease inhibitors cause significant stunted growth in H. armigera

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL DIET
entities.description: A medium used to feed H. armigera larvae with non-host plant PIs to study growth effects

entities.name: INSECT-RESISTANT TRANSGENIC PLANTS
entities.description: Plants genetically modified to express protease inhibitors for protection against pests

entities.name: GUT ZYMOGEN ACTIVATION
entities.description: The process of activating zymogens in the gut of H. armigera, inhibited by plant PIs

relationships.description: used to assess the effect of PIs on
